source_identity: Microsoft OmniParser V2.0 icon detector (official checkpoint: microsoft/OmniParser-v2.0/icon_detect/model.pt)

output.name: output0
output.semantics: [cx, cy, width, height, icon_confidence] × 8400; raw detections; postprocess requires confidence filtering + xywh→xyxy + NMS

license_note: The official OmniParser icon detector is licensed under AGPL-3.0.
model_version_correction: The prior v1.5 label was incorrect. This ONNX was exported directly from the uploaded model.pt, which the user obtained from the official OmniParser-v2.0 icon_detect folder.
